## Overview

El Galeón Tobacco is a family-owned Nicaraguan producer specialising in aged, air-cured Virginia and Burley blends for the premium pipe tobacco market. Founded in 1994 by the Vásquez family in Estelí, the company controls its entire supply chain from seedbed through curing barn to export packing. Distribution in the US market is handled exclusively through their Miami liaison office.

VCC carries three of their core lines: **Mar del Sur**, **Línea Dorada**, and the limited **Reserva Añeja** series. All ship on 21-day lead time from Estelí; domestic Miami clearance typically adds 3–5 business days.

## History

Initial contact was made at [[PCA 2026 Debrief]], where Rodrigo Vásquez approached the VCC booth during the trade floor session. He left samples of the Línea Dorada Robusto and followed up by email the following week.

The first purchase order (PO-2026-041) was placed on 2026-03-14 for a mixed trial case. Goods arrived 2026-04-08 with no discrepancies. Quality inspection passed; product entered the floor inventory the same day.

The relationship is early-stage. Rodrigo has indicated willingness to offer exclusive South Florida distribution rights for Reserva Añeja if VCC can commit to a quarterly minimum of $3,000 USD. This is worth revisiting at the Q3 planning review.

## Product lines

| Line | Format | Blend | MSRP (single) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mar del Sur Robusto | 5 × 52 | Nicaraguan Habano wrapper, Criollo binder | $14.50 |
| Mar del Sur Toro | 6 × 54 | As above | $16.00 |
| Línea Dorada Robusto | 5 × 50 | Connecticut wrapper, Nicaraguan core | $12.00 |
| Línea Dorada Churchill | 7 × 48 | As above | $15.00 |
| Reserva Añeja No. 1 | 6 × 52 | 5-yr aged Corojo wrapper | $28.00 |
| Reserva Añeja No. 2 | 4½ × 54 | As above, box-pressed | $26.00 |

Reserva Añeja is allocated inventory — contact Rodrigo for current availability before placing an order.

## Ordering notes

- **Minimum order**: $750 USD per invoice.
- **Reorder lead time**: 21 calendar days from written PO confirmation.
- **Payment**: Net 30 from invoice date. Wire transfer preferred; ACH accepted. No credit cards.
- **MAP policy**: Strict. No retailer may advertise below MSRP. Violations trigger a 60-day supply hold per the distributor agreement (see `sops/map-violation-response.md`).
- All orders must reference the current distributor price sheet. Contact Rodrigo by email for the current sheet; it is not posted publicly.
- Damaged goods: photograph within 24 hours of receipt and email to `claims@elgaleontobacco.com`. Credit applied to next invoice; no cash refunds.

## Compliance notes

El Galeón Tobacco products are imported under FDA registration number **15942-FL**. Retail sale requires:

- Tobacco retail permit (current — renews January).
- Age verification at point of sale (**21+**). See [[Age Verification Script]] for the current scripted protocol.
- Products must be stored at 65–70 % RH, 65–70 °F. See the Humidor Calibration SOP for maintenance schedule.
